free_text: Inelastic scattering of the neutrons in the energy
region from 5 to 8 MeV by Nb
Metallic niobium as hollow cylinder of 4.5 cm height,
Preliminary data are given in the Entry 40517
For large energies and small angles -
STATUS was updated in data Subents.
STATUS was corrected for new rules.
M.M. INL -> EL in SF3 according to the
title of Table I. INTED and DEP were deleted.
Reaction was corrected according to a
comment of the first author S.Simakov:
PAR in SF5, E-EXC-MX-A = 1.1 MeV were added.
Data restructured from the old ENTRY
according to a comment of N.Otsuka (NDS,IAEA).
